title: Runloop Extension: Resource Query & Sandbox Agent
interaction_flow: main → RunloopSandboxClient: __init__(bearer_token, base_url) → creates _sdk (AsyncRunloopSDK), _platform (RunloopPlatformClient)
main → RunloopPlatformClient: _preflight_public_resources(client) → blueprints.list_public(limit=3), benchmarks.list_public(limit=3)
main → _run_resource_query_phase(client, model, stream, managed_secret_name, network_policy_name)
_run_resource_query_phase → _build_resource_query_tools(client, ...) → creates @function_tool wrappers capturing query_results dict
_run_resource_query_phase → Agent(name='Runloop Resource Discovery Guide', tools=[query_runloop_secret, query_runloop_network_policy], tool_choice='required')
_run_resource_query_phase → _run_plain_agent(agent, prompt, workflow_name, stream) → Runner.run(agent, prompt, RunConfig(workflow_name=...))
Runner → Agent: invokes tool query_runloop_secret(name) → _query_runloop_secret(client, name) → client.platform.secrets.get(name) → RunloopResourceQueryResult

Runner → Agent: invokes tool query_runloop_network_policy(name) → _query_runloop_network_policy(client, name) → client.platform.network_policies.list(name=name) + .get(id).get_info() → RunloopResourceQueryResult
_run_resource_query_phase → validates both tools were called, returns (query_results: dict[str, RunloopResourceQueryResult], output: str)
main → _bootstrap_persistent_resources(client, managed_secret_name, managed_secret_value, network_policy_name, network_policy_id_override, query_results, axon_name)
_bootstrap_persistent_resources → if secret not found: client.platform.secrets.create(name, value)
_bootstrap_persistent_resources → if policy not found and no override: client.platform.network_policies.create(name, allow_all=True, ...) [handles conflict → reuse]
_bootstrap_persistent_resources → optional axon demo: axons.create, axons.query_sql, axons.batch_sql, axons.publish
_bootstrap_persistent_resources → returns dict[str, RunloopResourceBootstrapResult] with action in {created, reused, override}
main → _build_manifest(workspace_root, context) → Manifest with README.md, checklist.md, platform_context.json
main → _build_sandbox_agent(model, manifest, managed_secret_name) → SandboxAgent(capabilities=[WorkspaceShellCapability()], tool_choice='required')
main → RunloopSandboxClientOptions(..., blueprint_name, pause_on_exit=True, exposed_ports, launch_parameters, tunnel, gateways, mcp, managed_secrets)
main → RunloopSandboxClient.create(manifest, options)
RunloopSandboxClient.create → _upsert_runloop_managed_secrets(sdk, managed_secrets) → sdk.secret.create / sdk.secret.update per env_var
RunloopSandboxClient.create → _runloop_create_kwargs(blueprint_id, blueprint_name, env_vars, name, user_parameters, launch_parameters, tunnel, gateways, mcp, metadata, secrets) → dict
RunloopSandboxClient.create → AsyncRunloopSDK.devbox.create(timeout, **create_kwargs) → devbox object
RunloopSandboxClient.create → RunloopSandboxSessionState(session_id, manifest, devbox_id, pause_on_exit, timeouts, ...) + RunloopSandboxSession.from_state(state, sdk, devbox)
RunloopSandboxClient.create → _wrap_session(inner, instrumentation) → returns SandboxSession
main → session.start() → RunloopSandboxSession.start() → BaseSandboxSession.start() (provisions manifest, env, accounts)
main → session.write(RUNTIME_CONTEXT_PATH, json_payload)
main → _start_http_server(session, port, workspace_root) → session.exec('python -m http.server ...', shell=True, timeout=10)
main → session.resolve_exposed_port(http_port) → endpoint with host/port/tls
main → _poll_http_preview(preview_url, expected_substring, timeout_s) → _fetch_text() polling loop
main → _run_sandbox_agent(agent, prompt, session, workflow_name, stream)
_run_sandbox_agent → Runner.run(agent, prompt, RunConfig(sandbox=SandboxRunConfig(session=session), workflow_name=...))
Runner → SandboxAgent: executes instructions (pwd, find, read files, verify secret, create proof file)
_run_sandbox_agent → returns final_output str
main → session.read(AGENT_PROOF_PATH) → proof_text
main → session.aclose() → RunloopSandboxSession.shutdown() → devbox.suspend() + devbox.await_suspended() [pause_on_exit=True]
main → RunloopSandboxClient.resume(session.state) → sdk.devbox.from_id(devbox_id) + devbox.get_info() → if suspended: devbox.resume() + await_running()
RunloopSandboxClient.resume → RunloopSandboxSession.from_state(state, sdk, devbox) with _skip_start=True
main → resumed.start() → RunloopSandboxSession.start() [_skip_start=True] → checks snapshot restorable, fingerprint match → reapply ephemeral manifest
main → resumed.read(RUNTIME_CONTEXT_PATH), resumed.read(AGENT_PROOF_PATH)
main → resumed.aclose() [pause_on_exit=False → devbox.shutdown()]
main → RunloopSandboxClient.close() → sdk.aclose()
key_relationships: RunloopSandboxSession holds RunloopSandboxSessionState (state), AsyncRunloopSDK (_sdk), devbox object (_devbox)
RunloopSandboxClientOptions extends BaseSandboxClientOptions; contains launch_parameters, tunnel, gateways, mcp, managed_secrets
_run_resource_query_phase creates Agent (plain, not SandboxAgent); _build_sandbox_agent creates SandboxAgent
_runloop_create_kwargs is a pure builder function called inside RunloopSandboxClient.create()
function_tools (query_runloop_secret / query_runloop_network_policy) close over query_results dict and RunloopSandboxClient
data_models: RunloopResourceQueryResult(resource_type, name, found, id?, description?) — Pydantic BaseModel
RunloopResourceBootstrapResult(resource_type, name, action: created|reused|override, id?, found_before_bootstrap) — Pydantic BaseModel
RunloopSandboxSessionState(session_id, manifest, devbox_id, pause_on_exit, timeouts, exposed_ports, user_parameters, launch_parameters, tunnel, gateways, mcp, metadata, secret_refs)
RunloopSandboxClientOptions(blueprint_id?, blueprint_name?, pause_on_exit, exposed_ports, user_parameters?, launch_parameters?, tunnel?, gateways, mcp, managed_secrets, metadata)
phases_in_main: Agent Resource Discovery: _run_resource_query_phase → query agent calls secret/policy tools
Persistent Resource Bootstrap: _bootstrap_persistent_resources → create/reuse secret and network_policy
Tunnel Check: write context JSON, start HTTP server, resolve port, poll HTTP preview
Resume Check: client.resume(state) → devbox.resume() + await_running, read files, close
important_notes: _build_query_agent (L227) is defined but _run_resource_query_phase (L530) constructs its own Agent inline — both patterns exist
_run_resource_query_phase validates that both query tools were invoked before returning; raises RuntimeError if not
RunloopSandboxSession.start() with _skip_start=True (resume path) skips BaseSandboxSession.start() and checks snapshot fingerprint instead
pause_on_exit=True maps to Runloop devbox suspension (resumable); False maps to devbox shutdown/delete
managed_secrets are upserted via sdk.secret.create/update before devbox creation; refs stored in RunloopSandboxSessionState.secret_refs
Conflict-safe bootstrap: network_policy create catches 409/400-already-exists and re-queries by name
Axon demo (optional): axons.create → query_sql(CREATE TABLE) → batch_sql(INSERT) → publish event
WorkspaceShellCapability is a custom capability enabling shell tool for the SandboxAgent
DEFAULT_MODEL='gpt-5.4'; workspace rooted at DEFAULT_RUNLOOP_WORKSPACE_ROOT or DEFAULT_RUNLOOP_ROOT_WORKSPACE_ROOT (--root flag)
